user.title: Connect to Copilot Bridge
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to the local Copilot bridge service. Submitting this step tests the bridge connection.

bridge_connection_test.title: Bridge connection tested
bridge_connection_test.description: Bridge connection succeeded. Service: {service}. Version: {version}. GitHub OAuth client: {github_oauth_client_status}. GitHub token: {github_token_status}. Auth storage: {github_auth_storage}. Home Assistant MCP: {mcp_status}. Submit to continue.

github_config.title: Configure GitHub access
github_config.description: Choose how you want to initialize GitHub access for the bridge. Current bridge status: {current_status} OAuth client status: {oauth_client_status}. Configured bridge token: {configured_token_status}. Auth storage: {auth_storage_status}.

github_device_flow_options.title: Start GitHub sign-in
github_device_flow_options.description: Choose the GitHub OAuth scopes to request before starting browser-based sign-in.

manual_token.title: Set GitHub token
manual_token.description: Provide a GitHub token to validate and store on the bridge.

github_device_flow.title: Authorize GitHub device flow
github_device_flow.description: Open {verification_uri} and enter code {user_code}. Requested scopes: {scope}. After authorizing, submit again to continue. Current status: {status_message}

mcp_config.title: Configure Home Assistant MCP
mcp_config.description: Configure MCP after GitHub setup. Enable it only if this bridge should request the Home Assistant MCP server for prompts.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the bridge service
error.invalid_auth: Failed to validate the GitHub token
error.device_flow_error: GitHub device flow could not be completed
error.device_flow_not_available: GitHub device flow is not available because the bridge OAuth client is not configured
error.bridge_auth_not_configured: GitHub auth is not configured on the bridge yet
